text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right, it looks like you're actually serious about this. Let's forget
the routine for now and review the basic steps.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There! Hehe... ♪ Good! Now we're really in step!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Huh... Never seen this side of her...)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You're good at this! Could it be? I think you might be
enjoying it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd say it's 'cause you've been in a groove the last few times.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm just glad knowing how much your friends are going to like it.
Anyone who's debuted gets terribly busy this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, all those big races right around the corner... And some are
heading into the season you only get one shot at.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's inevitable that the main stars of the Droit end up being the ones
who've accomplished everything they set out to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Until now, the Droit has been more about making memories. That's
important in order to move on to the next step of our lives.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think... the Droit should be like a ceremony where
everyone can renew their motivation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Both those who've debuted and those who haven't yet... They're all
putting their hearts into their dreams and goals every single day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But no one, not even the best of us, can keep running without ever
resting. We need time to catch our breath, to leave today behind and
embrace tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's why I want as many people as possible to come. Especially the ones who can keep running until they achieve their goals.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone should start the year having fun... And I'll do everything I
can to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (So that's it. I finally get what she's after.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
(She really does simply want to make the Droit as great as she can.
Okay...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Look, I'm not the most suitable partner for you. Not 'cause I don't
want to. We're just completely different people.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're mistaken about me. I only do things for myself.
Making people smile ☆ never fits into my game plan.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm not mistaken at all. There's a good reason I chose you...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But never mind. I knew that together, you and I would be able to
bring the biggest smiles to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The vibe's on point for a party, but overall it's just noise. I knew I'd
hate trying to make people dance... Also...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(What am I doing making all these damn playlists? It's all 'cause the
prez started with this nonsense.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Asking !monad to be the DJ! How'd she even find my account?!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I never told anyone. I was just playing around to de-stress after doing
analysis work—totally amateur stuff.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Well, I did sell a couple things that ended up being good enough.
But nothing I posted ever went viral, so how?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(How the hell did she find me? If she knows and is trying to drag me
out into the open, that's plain evil... Or maybe it's even worse if it's all
a coincidence.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(What the hell is she thinking? She just thought of "DJ time" out of
nowhere? Not to mention, I've never DJ'd for an audience in my life.
Although...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Crap!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A "prosperous future"? "Climb to greater heights"? You just want to be the one who bestows those things to us... If that's not ego, I don't know what is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(I took an arrogant stance despite myself. Sirius isn't to blame. This
time of the year... makes me weak.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Students finish their lives at school and move on, their smiles marred
by tears—no, it is I who mars them.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Could it really all just be my ego? Are my reasons for celebrating
others driven by my selfish indulgence? )

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What has you looking so somber, President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki? How rare to see you here. But never mind that. You look
stunning. "A rose among thorns" perfectly suits you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, stop exaggerating. I find myself more captivated by your
pensive expression. If I'm worthy enough, might I give my assistance?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, you'll be leading the students in the exhibition dance... That's
already more than enough help for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, the Droit. I have a feeling the participation rate you've been
concerned about is going to be more than in previous years, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Have there perhaps been issues setting up the new DJ time? I heard
about the idea, that it was sent through the suggestion app.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What was it... "Dresses and dancing aren't really my thing. I just want
to make memories with the people most important to me..." Was that
it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm sure others feel the same way. I approved the idea because I
thought it'd be an opportunity for the students to move forward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Only... I still haven't gotten a reply from the music artist mentioned in
the suggestion. I'm also in the process of recruiting more students to
DJ.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see. However, aren't things progressing well enough? Meaning...
what's really bothering you... concerns yourself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be like you to pry any further. Though, the fact that you're
pushing this far might suggest otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... But I think I can tell when it's the right time to dig just a
little more... What do you say?
